strategy.name: EMA Pullback Strategy (4H)
strategy.description: EMA 8/20/50/200 defines trend structure. Price must pull back to EMA 20 in a healthy uptrend. Entry on a bullish reversal candle with volume confirmation. Risk never exceeds 1% of account.

indicators.ema_8: Fast trend. TP2 trailing stop — trail remaining position under EMA 8.
indicators.ema_20: Pullback target. Entry zone. Exit if 4H candle closes below EMA 20.
indicators.ema_50: Mid-term trend. Part of EMA stack ordering check.
indicators.ema_200: Macro trend filter. Price above = bull market only.

trend_filter: EMA stack MUST be ordered: EMA 8 > EMA 20 > EMA 50 > EMA 200
All EMAs MUST be sloping upward
Tangled / flat / crossing EMAs = ranging market → NO TRADE
pullback_conditions: Price MUST touch or come within 1% of EMA 20
Pullback depth MUST be 5%–15% from the most recent swing high
Price breaking through EMA 20 toward EMA 50 → NO TRADE (trend weakening)
entry_trigger: Bullish engulfing: green body fully covers prior red body
Hammer: small body at top, lower wick ≥ 2× body size
Shakeout: candle dips below EMA 20 but closes back above it
NEVER enter on the red pullback candle — wait for reversal candle to CLOSE
volume_confirmation: Volume on reversal candle MUST be higher than avg volume of pullback candles
Flat or declining volume on reversal → NO TRADE

position_sizing.stop_placement: Just below the swing low of the pullback

tp2.target: Trail stop just below EMA 8 on 4H chart
tp2.action: Exit remaining 50% when price closes below EMA 8 trail

exit_rules: Rule 19: 4H candle closes below EMA 20 after entry → full exit
Rule 20: EMA 8 crosses below EMA 20 → full exit
Rule 21: Price closes below original stop loss → full exit

risk_rules: NEVER risk more than 1% of account per trade
NEVER enter mid-candle — signal valid only after 4H candle CLOSES
NEVER trade if any trend filter condition fails
Paper trade first — validate with PAPER_TRADING=true before going live
